_comment: Subject-configurable PUSH policy for phaedo_escalate (docs/roadmap/escalation-and-push.md). Controls which consult signals WAKE your phone for a live decision. `escalate` ALWAYS pushes (it means a human is needed) and is not configurable here. Only `clarify` is tunable: mode is "always" | "consequential" (the default: irreversible OR high-magnitude actions only) | "never". A per-domain override (by_domain, substring match, case-insensitive) beats the default. Portable: copy into the vault as phaedo_fingerprint.escalation_policy to sync across devices, or point PHAEDO_ESCALATION_POLICY at this file to try it. The file overrides the vault policy.
